name: Shipwrecked
description: This model gains the following trigger on all actions printed on its stat card:
extraction_notes: This upgrade grants a universal trigger to all actions on the model's stat card rather than granting new abilities or actions

The trigger is: (c) Drowning Tide: This trigger must be declared, if able. Immediately, this action fails. This model gains an enemy Aura (Hazardous) token. This model may discard a card to discard this upgrade.
Since this trigger applies to existing actions rather than being a granted action itself, it is not included in granted_actions array
